tuning: D A D G B E

recommended.song_name: I Still Havent Found What Im Looking For

content:
Digital Underground
The Humpty Dance

Play in drop D tuning, slide up to octave at 12th fret on low E.

[Verse 1]
[ch]Am[/ch]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]
All right! Stop whatcha doin' 'cause I'm about to ruin[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]
the image and the style that ya used to.[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]                                    [ch]Am[/ch]
I look funny but yo I'm makin' money see[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]
so yo world I hope you're ready for me.[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]
Now gather round I'm the new fool in town[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]
and my sound's laid down by the Underground.[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]
I drink up all the Hennessey ya got on ya shelf[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]
so just let me introduce myself[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]
My name is Humpty, pronounced with a Umpty.[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]
Yo ladies, oh how I like to hump thee.[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]                                    [ch]Am[/ch]
And all the rappers in the top ten--please allow me to bump thee.[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]
I'm steppin' tall, y'all, and just like Humpty Dumpty[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]
you're gonna fall when the stereos pump me.[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]                [ch]A[/ch]
I like to rhyme, I like my beats funky,[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]            [ch]Am[/ch]
I'm spunky. I like my oatmeal lumpy.[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]                  [ch]A[/ch]                  [ch]D[/ch]                 [ch]D(sus)[/ch]
I'm sick wit dis, straight gangsta mack I get ridiculous[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]
I'll eat up all your crackers and your licorice[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]
hey yo fat girl, c'mere--are ya ticklish?[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]                           [ch]A[/ch]
Yeah, I called ya fat. Look at me, I'm skinny[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]
Never stopped me from gettin' busy[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]             [ch]A[/ch]
I'm a freak I like the girls with the boom[/tab]
N.C.
I once got busy in a Burger King bathroom
[tab][ch]A[/ch]           [ch]A[/ch]
I'm crazy. Allow me to amaze thee.[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                 [ch]D[/ch]
They say I'm ugly but it just don't faze me.[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]
I'm still gettin' in the girls' pants[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]
and I even got my own dance[/tab]

[Chorus]
[ch]Am[/ch]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                         [ch]Am[/ch]     [ch]A[/ch]
The Humpty Dance is your chance to do the hump[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                         [ch]Am[/ch]     [ch]A[/ch]            [ch]A[/ch]
The Humpty Dance is your chance to do the hump, said sexy[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]             [ch]Am[/ch]                [ch]A[/ch]
Baby, they're doin the humpty hump...C'mon[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                 [ch]Am[/ch]            [ch]A[/ch]
You n Me Baby...we're doin the humpy hump[/tab]

[Verse 2]
[ch]A[/ch]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]
People say "Yo, Humpty, you're really funny lookin'"[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]
that's all right 'cause I get things cookin'[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]                                        [ch]Am[/ch]
Ya stare, ya glare, ya constantly try to compare me[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                       [ch]A[/ch]
but ya can't get near me[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]
I give 'em more, see, and on the floor,[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]
B,all the girls they adore me[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]
Oh yes, ladies, I'm really bein' sincere[/tab]
N.C.
'cause in a 69 my humpty nose will tickle ya rear.
[tab][ch]A[/ch]                [ch]A[/ch]
My nose is big, uh-uh I'm not ashamed[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                    [ch]D[/ch]
Big like a pickle, I'm still gettin' paid[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]                          [ch]A[/ch]
I get laid by the ladies, ya know I'm in charge,[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                  [ch]Am[/ch]
both how I'm livin' and my nose is large[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]               [ch]A[/ch]
I get stoopid, I shoot an arrow like Cupid,[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]
I use a word that don't mean nothin', like loopid[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]
I sang on Doowhutchalike, and if ya missed it,[/tab]
N.C.
I'm the one who said just grab 'em in the biscuits
[tab][ch]A[/ch]
I think ya that I like to bite[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                                  [ch]D[/ch]
Well, yeah, I guess it's obvious, I also like to write.[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]                                         [ch]Am[/ch]
All ya had to do was give Humpty a chance[/tab]
N.C.
and now I'm gonna do my dance.

[Chorus]
[ch]Am[/ch]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                         [ch]Am[/ch]     [ch]A[/ch]
The Humpty Dance is your chance to do the hump[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                         [ch]Am[/ch]     [ch]A[/ch]            [ch]A[/ch]
The Humpty Dance is your chance to do the hump, said sexy[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]             [ch]Am[/ch]                [ch]A[/ch]
Baby, they're doin the humpty hump...C'mon[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                 [ch]Am[/ch]            [ch]A[/ch]
You n Me Baby...we're doin the humpy hump[/tab]

Breakdown:

Oh, yeah, that's the break, y'all
Let me hear a little bit of that bass groove right here
Oh, yeah!
Now that I told ya a little bit about myself
let me tell ya a little bit about this dance
It's real easy to do--check it out

Verse 3:

First I limp to the side like my leg was broken
Shakin' and twitchin' kinda like I was smokin'
Crazy wack funky
People say ya look like M.C. Hammer on crack, Humpty
That's all right 'cause my body's in motion
It's supposed to look like a fit or a convulsion
Anyone can play this game
This is my dance, y'all, Humpty Hump's my name
No two people will do it the same
Ya got it down when ya appear to be in pain
Humpin', funkin', jumpin',
jig around, shakin' ya rump,
and when the dude a chump pump points a finger like a stump
tell him step off, I'm doin' the Hump.

Chorus:

The Humpty Dance is your chance to do the hump
Do the Humpty Hump, come on and do the Humpty Hump
Do the Humpty Hump, just watch me do the Humpty Hump
Do ya know what I'm doin', doin' the Humpty Hump
Do the Humpty Hump, do the Humpty Hump

Black people, do the Humpty Hump, do the Humpty Hump
White people, do the Humpty Hump, do the Humpty Hump
Puerto Ricans, do the Humpty Hump, just keep on doin' the hump
Samoans, do the Humpty Hump, do the Humpty Hump
Let's get stoopid!

Chorus:

The Humpty Dance is your chance to do the hump
Do the Humpty Hump, come on and do the Humpty Hump
Do the Humpty Hump, just watch me do the Humpty Hump
Do ya know what I'm doin', doin' the Humpty Hump
Do the Humpty Hump, do the Humpty Hump

Oh, yeah, come on and break it down

Outro:

Once again, the Underground is in the house
I'd like to send a shout out to the whole world,
keep on doin' the Humpty Dance,
and to the ladies,
peace and humptiness forever
